message:
fix(test): add skipIfNoDolt guard to all init tests that need Dolt

Add skipIfNoDolt helper and apply it to 10 test functions in
init_test.go that call rootCmd.Execute with "init" args or open
Dolt stores directly. Fixes CI failures on all platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
